{{Quote|Crude weapon, but useful.|Quinlan Vos|<ref name="SW19">[[Star Wars (1998) 19|''Star Wars'' (1998) 19]]</ref>}}
The '''Tatooine blaster pistol''' was a model that saw use during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The pistol was similar in appearance to other [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]]' blaster models like the [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]]. The blaster featured a sighting scope above its thin barrel. [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] was known to carry one of these [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and at least one was seen in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

Grahrk used his blaster during the hunt for [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] though Vos outsmarted the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] by reversing the blaster's [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] in anticipation of Grahrk's betrayal. Grahrk went on to aid Vos and kept the blaster in use for years to come. He pulled the blaster on Vos once more during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] though the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] again overpowered the Devaronian.

{{Weapon-stub}}
